item.title: 外资银行发现印度增长伴随严格条件
item.description: 全球银行纷纷涌向印度近4万亿美元的经济体，却发现进入市场需付出代价：控制权受限、回报周期漫长，且需要采用非常规的交易结构。【原文：Global banks attracted to India’s nearly $4 trillion economy are discovering that access comes at a price: limited control, drawn-out returns and the need for unconventional deal structures.】

item.title: 菲律宾考虑缩短工作周、减少空调使用以节约能源
item.description: 随着中东局势紧张推高全球燃料成本，菲律宾正寻求节能之道。政府建议民众减少使用空调，并避免非必要的出行。【原文：The Philippines is looking at ways to save on energy as tensions in the Middle East push global fuel costs higher, with the government suggesting people use their air conditioners less and shy away from non-essential travel.】

item.title: 债券交易员紧盯就业数据，在油价冲击中测算美联储政策走向
item.description: 债券投资者自伊朗战争爆发以来一直关注通胀问题，他们表示，美国月度就业报告中的意外数据可能颠覆他们对美联储降息的预期。【原文：Bond investors, who have been focused on inflation since the Iran war began, say a surprise in the monthly US jobs report has the potential to upend their expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate cuts.】

item.title: Anthropic表示别无选择，只能在法庭上与五角大楼抗争
item.description: 因在人工智能安全保障问题上与国防部发生争执而面临被列入黑名单威胁的人工智能公司Anthropic PBC，预计这场对峙将演变为一场法律战。【原文：Anthropic PBC, threatened with blacklisting by the Defense Department in a dispute over AI safeguards, expects the standoff to lead to a legal battle.】

item.title: 美敦力子公司美国IPO募资5.6亿美元，定价低于预期区间
item.description: 糖尿病管理公司MiniMed集团公司——这家即将从医疗巨头美敦力公司分拆出来的企业——在美国首次公开募股中筹集了5.6亿美元，其定价低于市场预期区间。【原文：MiniMed Group Inc., a diabetes management firm that will be separated from health-care giant Medtronic Plc, raised $560 million in a US initial public offering that priced below its marketed range.】

item.title: 中国年度经济计划着重推进科技发展、稳定市场
item.description: 中国新发布的政府工作报告透露出一个信号：尽管国家领导人对今年的经济增长目标可能不太雄心勃勃，但他们或许对实现新目标更有信心。【原文：China’s new annual government work report offers a hint that, while the nation’s leaders may be less ambitious in their goal for growth this year, they are perhaps also more confident in meeting the new target.】

item.title: 高盛称油市尚未对美国霍尔木兹海峡措施抱有信心
item.description: 高盛集团表示，对于美国在霍尔木兹海峡保护油气运输船的安全措施能否化解当前局势，"信心并不十分充足"。【原文：There’s “not a ton of confidence” that US security measures to protect oil and gas tankers in the Strait of Hormuz will resolve the current situation, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.】

item.title: 美国颁发许可证允许部分俄罗斯石油对印出口
item.description: 美国颁布了一项通用许可证，允许部分俄罗斯石油销往印度，使该国在波斯湾冲突升级导致主要产油区被切断之际，获得更多燃料采购选择。【原文：The US issued a general license to allow for some Russian oil sales to India, giving the nation more options to purchase fuel as an escalating conflict in the Persian Gulf cuts off a major producing region.】

item.title: 前Palantir人工智能员工被禁止挖角及使用商业机密
item.description: 帕兰蒂尔科技公司获得法院禁令，禁止三名前雇员挖角其员工并利用机密信息为一家人工智能初创企业服务。【原文：Palantir Technologies Inc. won an order blocking three former employees from trying to poach its staff and using confidential information for an artificial intelligence startup.】

item.title: 巴西国家石油公司业绩超预期，强劲产量抵消油价下跌影响
item.description: 巴西国有石油生产商巴西石油公司（Petrobras）的利润超出预期，强劲的石油产量和创纪录的出口量帮助缓冲了原油价格疲软带来的冲击。【原文：Brazil’s state-controlled oil producer Petrobras surpassed profit expectations after robust oil production and record exports helped cushion the impact of weaker crude prices.】

item.title: 亚洲储备金储备雄厚，足以抵御货币贬值
item.description: 随着中东战争升级推高能源价格——这对该地区石油进口经济体构成重大风险——亚洲8万亿美元的外汇储备正为各国央行提供更多火力，以捍卫本国货币。【原文：Asia’s $8 trillion in foreign-exchange reserves are giving central banks more firepower to defend their currencies as the escalating Middle East war drives up energy prices, a key risk for the region’s oil-importing economies.】

item.title: 黄金与国债双双下跌，长期稳健的避险资产交易正面临失守
item.description: 传统避险资产——美国国债、日元、瑞士法郎和黄金——本周未能为投资者提供避风港。【原文：Traditional safe havens — Treasuries, the yen, the Swiss franc, and gold — have offered investors no refuge this week.】

item.title: 黄金本周料将下跌，美元走强抵消战争溢价效应
item.description: 黄金正朝着逾一个月来的首次周度下跌迈进，美元走强以及中东持续战事引发的通胀风险对其构成压力。【原文：Gold was on track for the first weekly loss in more than a month, pressured by a stronger US dollar and inflationary risks tied to the ongoing war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 中东战事推动油价创2022年以来最大单周涨幅
item.description: 中东战事引发能源市场剧烈震荡，生产商、进口商和运输商纷纷陷入应对困境，油价正朝着2022年以来最大单周涨幅迈进。【原文：Oil headed for the biggest weekly surge since 2022 as the war in the Middle East unleashed a wave of disruption across energy markets, with producers, importers and shippers struggling to deal with the fall-out.】

item.title: 韩国通胀率维持在央行目标区间内，伊朗因素尚未显现影响
item.description: 韩国整体通胀率维持在央行目标水平，表明在伊朗冲突引发全球能源价格波动浪潮之前，整体价格压力仍得到有效控制。【原文：South Korea’s headline inflation held steady at the central bank’s target level, suggesting overall price pressures remained contained before the Iran conflict triggered a wave of global energy volatility.】

item.title: 中国首位游戏业亿万富翁力图打造"比人类更聪明"的人工智能
item.description:
隐居的沙达创始人陈天桥正押上个人财富进行这场赌注。【原文：

Reclusive Shanda founder Chen Tianqiao is betting his personal fortune on it.

】

item.title: 摩根大通股东关系联席主管波雷蒂离职
item.description: 知情人士透露，摩根大通股东关系团队负责人之一阿尔弗雷多·波雷蒂已离开这家华尔街银行。【原文：Alfredo Porretti, one of the leaders of JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s shareholder engagement team, has left the Wall Street bank, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 石油套期保值交易台结束创纪录的一周，为更多波动做好准备
item.description: 石油生产商的套期保值部门正结束被许多人称为创纪录的一周，同时为即将到来的更多挑战做好准备——伊朗战争毫无缓和迹象。【原文：Oil producer hedging desks are closing out what many describe as a record-setting week and buckling up for more to come with the war in Iran showing no signs of easing.】

item.title: 伊朗黑客攻击导致断网事件与以色列军事打击同时发生
item.description: 据一家威胁情报公司称，当以色列军队袭击德黑兰一处军事基地时，与伊朗政府支持的黑客相关的计算机从互联网上消失。【原文：Computers associated with Iranian government-backed hackers disappeared from the internet when Israel’s military attacked a military compound in Tehran, according to a threat intelligence firm.】

item.title: 伊朗战争正暴露亚洲各地的石油风险
item.description:
在今天的《亚洲大观》播客中，我们将探讨伊朗战争如何撼动全球石油市场，并使亚洲主要经济体面临重大能源冲击的风险。【原文：

On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, how the Iran war is rattling global oil markets and exposing Asia’s top economies to the risk of a major energy shock.

】

item.title: 亚洲股市料将下跌，原油开盘走低：市场综述
item.description: 亚洲股市周五早盘走低，此前美国股市和债券下跌，延续了本周的震荡走势，因中东局势紧张加剧的新闻持续发酵。美国国债下跌，美元走强。【原文：Asian equities were primed for early declines Friday after US stocks and bonds fell, extending a week of whipsawing moves as headlines depicted escalating tensions in the Middle East. Treasuries dropped and the dollar gained.】

item.title: 道琼斯指数2026年转跌，伊朗战争冲击传统经济指标
item.description: 道琼斯工业平均指数——其今年涨幅曾被特朗普总统作为其经济政策成效的佐证——因美伊持续冲突打击投资者信心，年内涨幅已转为负值。【原文：The Dow Jones Industrial Average — whose climb this year was cited by President Donald Trump as evidence of his policies’ economic effectiveness — has turned negative for the year as the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran weighed on investor sentiment.】

item.title: 随着中国雄心壮志不断扩大，人民币融资规模创下2000亿美元的历史新高
item.description: 人民币融资从未像现在这样受欢迎，越来越多的国家和外国企业正积极进入这个市场，这表明中国推动本币国际化的努力正在取得成效。【原文：Yuan financing has never been as popular as it is now, with more countries and foreign companies tapping the market, in a sign that China’s ambition to internationalize its currency is bearing fruit.】

item.title: 美国证券交易委员会终止对加密货币亿万富翁孙宇晨的诉讼
item.description: 美国证券交易委员会将终止对加密货币亿万富翁孙宇晨的诉讼。【原文：The US Securities and Exchange Commission will end its lawsuit against crypto billionaire Justin Sun.】

item.title: 奈飞进军播客领域在YouTube上的表现如何
item.description: 与去年同期相比，Netflix独家播客创作者的频道增长速度最高下降了50%。【原文：Podcasters exclusive to Netflix are seeing their channel growth slow by as much as 50% compared to the year prior】

item.title: Anthropic五角大楼纠纷加速其消费端布局
item.description: 克劳德制造商在普通用户中获得新动力，而其企业业务正面临压力。【原文：The Claude maker gains new traction with everyday users while its enterprise business is under pressure】

item.title: 伊朗战争凸显高端防空系统局限性，安杜瑞尔高管称
item.description: 安杜里尔工业公司首席战略官指出，与伊朗的冲突凸显了现有高端防空系统在应对持续涌来的廉价敌方导弹、无人机和制导炸弹时的局限性。【原文：The conflict with Iran has underscored the limitations of relying on existing high-end air defense systems against sustained waves of cheaper enemy missiles, drones and guided bombs, the chief strategy officer of defense technology company Anduril Industries Inc. said.】

item.title: 联邦调查局在其计算机网络上发现“可疑”活动
item.description: 联邦调查局周四表示，其计算机系统中发现了"可疑"活动，但未透露更多细节。【原文：The FBI said Thursday that it had found “suspicious” activity on its computer systems, but didn’t provide further details.】

item.title: 亚马逊在线商店在美国部分用户中出现故障
item.description: 亚马逊公司网站及移动应用于周四出现故障，部分用户使用时遭遇产品列表和结账选项等关键功能显示错误页面的情况。【原文：Amazon.com Inc.’s website and mobile app malfunctioned for some users on Thursday, with critical features like product listings and checkout options producing error pages.】

item.title: 众议院委员会推进Meta、谷歌在线儿童安全规则
item.description: 众议院一个关键委员会周四推进了一系列旨在改善儿童网络安全的法案，为美国在各国竞相为未成年人制定社交媒体新保护措施之际采取的轻触式监管注入了新动力。【原文：A key House committee on Thursday advanced a package of bills aimed at improving children’s safety online, injecting fresh momentum for a light-touch US effort as countries race to create new protections for minors on social media.】
